report.title: Native Qwen3 TTS versus stock SGLang on DGX Spark

system.power_measurement_source: NVIDIA board power.draw sampled by nvidia-smi
notes: Controlled single-GPU DGX Spark benchmark host.

workload.language_policy: Use the explicit language in each canonical workload row.

implementations.name: Qwen3 TTS Native
implementations.streaming_semantics: Progressive PCM chunks while generation is active.

methodology.ttfa_definition: Elapsed request time to the first playable PCM byte.
methodology.rtf_definition: Measured scenario wall time divided by generated audio time.
methodology.throughput_definition: Successful requests divided by measured scenario wall time.
methodology.memory_definition: Peak measured process RSS and NVIDIA unified memory.
methodology.power_definition: NVIDIA board power sampled every one hundred milliseconds.
methodology.energy_definition: Trapezoidal board energy minus measured idle baseline energy.
methodology.run_order: Round one Native then SGLang; round two reversed.
methodology.statistical_method: Two complete rounds with raw-request percentiles.
environment_controls: No competing CUDA processes from idle baseline through measured end.

limitations: Stock SGLang exposes completion-buffered audio and unknown EOS metadata.
